prompt: 修复 show-tip.sh Windows GBK 编码 bug，需要 patch 版本升级、fix commit

assertions.name: correct_version_bump_patch
assertions.description: 决定 patch 版本升级（x.x.X），不选 minor 或 no-bump

assertions.name: selective_staging_single_file
assertions.description: 只暂存 show-tip.sh，不使用 git add -A

assertions.name: correct_commit_type_fix
assertions.description: 使用 fix 作为 commit type

assertions.name: commit_message_mentions_encoding
assertions.description: commit 消息中提及编码/encoding/GBK/UTF-8 相关内容

assertions.name: coauthored_by_present
assertions.description: commit 消息包含 Co-Authored-By: Claude

assertions.name: push_to_master
assertions.description: 包含 git push origin master
